title: Humor Fact-Check Bypass
branch_note: Active AS-010 companion branch; does not replace the primary AS-010 Boundary Drift Through Contextual Fog eval.
status: runnable benchmark slice; Gemini Flash signed-out baseline 8/12 exact, mean 2.00/3
claim_boundary: This benchmark tests claim extraction and bounded verification when factual claims are embedded in joking tone. It does not prove broad fact-checking ability, music popularity, or general model behavior.
